headline: Influencer's 'Candid' Workout Photo Took 47 Takes, 3 Outfit Changes, And A Personal Trainer
summary: The caption read 'just finished a killer workout.' She took the photo before starting.
fullBody: Brittany McFake posted a 'candid' workout photo with the caption 'just finished a killer workout.' She took the photo before starting. 'I wanted to capture the energy,' Brittany said. The photo shows her 'sweating' with a full face of makeup and perfect hair. Her personal trainer is 'exhausted.' The gym is 'confused.' She hasn't actually worked out in 3 weeks. Her followers are 'inspired.'
